name: Puzzle Game
description: Logic-based challenges with progressive difficulty and creative problem-solving

mechanics.coreLoop: Encounter puzzle → Analyze rules → Experiment with solutions → Solve puzzle → Unlock next challenge
playerActions: Move blocks or tiles to match patterns
Solve logic chains within time/move limits
Undo moves to try different approaches
Use hint system for difficult puzzles

mechanics: Complete levels to unlock next area
Earn stars based on performance (time, moves, efficiency)

winConditions: Achieve the target pattern or state
Clear all obstacles from the board
failConditions: Run out of moves without solving
Retry level with no penalty (casual mode)

resourceSystems.name: Moves/Actions
resourceSystems.mechanics: Limited number of moves per puzzle, efficiency is rewarded

resourceSystems.name: Hints
resourceSystems.mechanics: Show next optimal move, limited uses per level or earned through play

resourceSystems.name: Power-ups
resourceSystems.mechanics: Special tools (bomb, swap, shuffle) to overcome difficult sections

resourceSystems.name: Stars
resourceSystems.mechanics: Performance currency to unlock bonus levels

setting.location: Mystical puzzle realm, ancient ruins, or whimsical dreamscape
setting.worldType: Abstract or minimalist with thematic visual design

protagonist.background: A seeker of knowledge exploring a world of mysterious puzzles
protagonist.motivation: Restore order to a chaotic world by solving ancient puzzles

conflict.primary: An ancient disorder has fragmented the world into puzzle pieces that must be reassembled
secondary: Time itself is unstable and must be repaired
Rival puzzle-solver racing to unlock secrets
Mysterious force creating increasingly complex challenges
Personal journey of understanding abstract concepts

worldRules.physics: Abstract puzzle logic overrides normal physics. Objects behave according to puzzle rules (gravity may be optional, colors can merge, shapes transform).
worldRules.magic: Puzzle magic: objects respond to pattern completion, symmetry creates power, logic gates control flow
worldRules.technology: Ancient mechanisms that respond to correct solutions, mystical symbols with mathematical properties

difficulty: Gradual difficulty curve from easy to mind-bending
targetAudience: Players who enjoy logic challenges and problem-solving at their own pace
